shared_properties: 32x48 body scale with horn silhouette and teal inner core.
Feet and hand silhouettes stay readable against high-contrast beams.
differences: Four frames cover crouch release, ascent, apex, and descent.
Torso elongates 4 px on ascent to communicate lift.
Legs tuck inward on the apex frame for gap readability.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle and switch to this atlas during jump and fall states through PlayerStateSprite.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_jump_4f_10fps.png through AssetServer before jump state transitions occur.
runtime_notes: Jump frames share the idle pivot on the grounded frame.
Apex frame holds for one timer cycle in gameplay, not in the atlas.
Tucked legs stay clear of a 32 px width budget.

context.usage: Gap-crossing and ladder-entry jump sequence for shadow-platform traversal.

shape.silhouette: Four-pose jump arc with compressed release, elongated ascent, tucked apex, and extended descent.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 128x48 px with four 32x48 frames.
The apex frame is visibly distinct from the ascent and descent frames.
Grounded release frame preserves a stable contact point for animation blending.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Art deco tower skyline, twilight palette, gold trim rhythm, and layered silhouette depth anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra body proportions, horn silhouette, limb taper, and exposure glow anchor.
